patient_summary: Olivia, age 73, female (contact +1 310 556 1256). Active problem list across records includes mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative anemia/unspecified anemia, leg pain, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (documented 01/21/2025). Significant outpatient and procedural activity: planned/performed colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Key labs: 07/03/2023 lipid panel with triglycerides 158 (H), LDL 62, HDL 54; iron studies 07/03/2023 showing Iron 41 (L), Iron saturation 15 (L), Ferritin 266.8 (H); eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L). Multiple care teams documented including Hand HA MD (PCP) and several Piedmont specialists. Notable data conflicts exist for date of birth, legal sex, and smoking status across source documents.
